statement: In every magma, Equation 4048 (`x * y = (z * (w * y)) * u`) implies Equation 3520 (`x * y = x * ((y * x) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0866
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op w y)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op y x) z))
